Activité Nous sommes spécialisés dans la technologie 
des 
fluides 
supercritiques. 
Nous 
développons 
et 
produisons des ingrédients bioactifs innovant extraits de 
plantes comme alternatives vertes pour la santé et le bien-
être, dans une quête pour accélérer la consommation 
durable.
Aspect Technologique L'utilisation de la technologie SC-CO2 
pour l'extraction, la purification de composés bioactifs à 
partir de plantes.
Originalité Grâce à des ingrédients bioactifs innovants, 
Actifs Précieux propose des solutions naturelles durables 
et responsables.
Activity We specialize in supercritical fluid technology. 
We produce plant-based bioactive ingredients as green 
alternatives for health and well-being, in a quest to 
accelerate sustainable consumption.
Technological Aspect The use of SC-CO2 technology for 
the extraction, purification and formulation of bioactive 
compounds from plants.
Originality Through innovative bioactive ingredients, Actifs 
Précieux delivers sustainable and responsible natural 
solutions.

#  anavid
Company |
France, Paris

[ Play Video ](https://youtube.com/watch?v=QXvISINfZcw "Play Video") Play
##  About
Anavid is a Paris-based computer-vision deeptech focused on Retail Intelligence. We turn existing CCTV into privacy-respectful sensors that deliver real-time, actionable insight—helping stores lose less and sell more while improving customer experience.
Mission: empower organizations with real-time, affordable, privacy-first video analytics that transform massive video flows into useful, ethical, high-impact insights.
Products:
- Shoplifting Detector – an AI layer that analyzes live video to spot theft-related behaviors and send instant, human-actionable alerts (short audit clips) to store teams. Works with existing cameras, runs on-premise or in the cloud, and uses encryption, access controls, and auditing. No facial recognition or PII.
- ShopAnalytics – store intelligence: footfall counting, queue measurement, heatmaps, dwell patterns, and aggregate age/gender estimation. Insights guide staffing, layout, and promotions. Open APIs connect to POS/ERP/WFM/CRM.
Why Anavid?
- Deploys on infrastructure retailers already own; scales to multi-camera, multi-site estates.
- Privacy by design (anonymization, encryption, role-based access; no biometrics).
- Flexible architecture: edge + cloud options, data-residency compliant.
- Measurable outcomes: less shrink, shorter waits, better on-shelf availability, clearer decisions.
Business Model :
- B2B subscription (SaaS or on-prem licence) priced per store/site (and/or per camera), with tiered plans by features and usage.
- Add-ons for advanced analytics (e.g., forecasting/decisioning), analytics APIs, and premium governance/compliance.
- One-time setup/integration.
- Annual contracts with volume discounts .
Roadmap :
Enhancing ShopAnalytics with short-horizon forecasting and decision support (staffing, planograms, localized promotions). Auto-adaptation of models to store specifics is a key R&D target.
Keywords: retail intelligence, computer vision, loss prevention, shoplifting detection, video analytics, queue analytics, heatmaps, footfall analysis, theft prevention, store optimization, asset protection, in-store analytics, AI in retail, privacy-by-design, real-time alerts, on-premise and cloud, SaaS.
